description: Wrapper composite action (action.yml) end-to-end tests - verifies all three sub-actions ran and outputs are consistent

tests.name: all_output_files_present
tests.description: Verify both artifact.yaml and workflowlog.yml exist — confirms setup+import+run all executed

tests.name: artifact_id_and_workflow_id_both_set
tests.description: Verify both ARTIFACT_ID and WORKFLOW_ID env vars are non-empty (wrapper passed outputs correctly)

tests.name: workflow_url_references_artifact
tests.description: Verify WORKFLOW_URL is a valid https URL produced by the wrapper

tests.name: artifact_id_propagated_to_workflow
tests.description: Verify wrapper correctly passed import-artifact output artifact_id into run-workflow as source_artifact

tests.name: workflow_id_consistent_across_outputs
tests.description: Verify WORKFLOW_ID env var matches the id in workflowlog.yml — confirms wrapper output wiring is correct

tests.name: artifact_id_consistent_across_outputs
tests.description: Verify ARTIFACT_ID env var matches artifact_id in artifact.yaml — confirms wrapper output wiring is correct
